title: Eindhoven-based Luna.ai Raises $2.5M in a Pre-Seed Funding
full_text:
Funding
[Funding alert] Eindhoven-based Luna.ai Raises $2.5M in a Pre-Seed Funding
Nov 3, 2023 | By Team SR
Eindhoven-based Luna.ai raises $2.5M in a pre-seed funding. CapitalT, an Amsterdam-based seed-stage venture capital fund that funds tech startups, led the oversubscribed investment.
Follow us
Follow us
A former Salesforce EVP, the former CMO of Zoom, the angel fund of Notion Capital, and AI investor Curiosity are among the other participants in this round.
Read also - Ukraine-based Product Development Company Trinetix Raises $10 million in Funding
RECOMMENDED FOR YOU
Funding
Paris-Based Cybersecurity Startup MokN Raises €2.6M To Expand In The U.S.
Kailee Rainse
Oct 3, 2025
Funding
Proteine Resources funding news – Poland-based Proteine Resources Secures €1.36 Million in Funding
Team SR
Oct 9, 2024
Funding
BiocSol funding news – Belgium-based BiocSol Secures €4.4Million in Funding
Kailee Rainse
Feb 4, 2025
Steven Nelemans, CEO of Luna.ai says, “What sets this round apart is the vast experience these investors bring. Our investors have learned the ropes, led large sales teams and used competitive products. The conviction they bring to this round gives us even more confidence in our vision.”
With the funds, Luna.ai aims to grow its workforce, create enterprise-level products, and employ artificial intelligence to alter the conventional sales funnel.
Read also - Hungary-based Startup Flawless Secures $2.2 Mn in Seed Funding
The recently released Command Centre, allowing sales directors to "easily" manage and scale their team of human and AI salespeople, was seen as a crucial step by the startup.
Eva de Mol, partner at CapitalT says, “Luna.ai is not about developing yet another sales tool. Luna.ai is on a mission to change the way we do sales, and we look forward to doing so to embark on an adventure with them.”
About Luna.ai
Luna.ai , a 2022 beginning, is a leader in AI sales technology thanks to its extensive B2B platform. The software uses artificial intelligence (AI) to find perfect leads, compile relevant web data, and create persuasive sales emails.
Read also - Finnish AI Governance Startup Saidot Raises €1.75M Seed Round Funding
The platform enables scalability and streamlines the sales process by acting as an AI Sales Development Representative (SDR), drawing on the expertise of several sales people for training.
